creator: igor.arabesc.pavlov@gmail.com
text:
It's FreeBSD 11.0.

make.conf:

KERNCONF=GENERIC
CPUTYPE?=native
CFLAGS= -O2 -pipe -funroll-loops
COPTFLAGS= -O2 -pipe -funroll-loops
OPTIONS_UNSET=X11
OPTIONS_UNSET=DEBUG
MK_PROFILE=no
OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS=YES
BUILD_OPTIMIZED=YES
BUILD_STATIC=YES
WITH_PKGNG=yes
WITH_CPUFLAGS=YES
OPTIONS_SET=OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=libressl
